name: How long do I have to report my back injury from work in West Valley City?
description: 180 days in Utah, but report immediately to protect benefits.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report my back injury from work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days in Utah, but report immediately to protect benefits.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Utah, report within 180 days to avoid disqualification from benefits.** Immediate reporting is best; next of kin can report if you can't.[1] Key factors: Employer reports to insurer in 7 days, insurer decides in 21-45 days; document everything. Tell your doctor details for Form 123. Delays weaken claims, so act fast to preserve rights.
